failed_tests.name: checkout > should complete purchase with credit card
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: Waiting for selector '.order-confirmation' exceeded 30000ms

failed_tests.name: checkout > should apply discount code
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected 90.00 to equal 85.00

hypotheses.description: Order confirmation page rendering is delayed beyond test timeout; possible async state update regression in checkout flow
Discount calculation logic has an off-by-one or rounding error for specific code types

failed_tests.name: fund-transfer > should transfer between accounts
failed_tests.error: Error: expected status 200, got 403 Forbidden

hypotheses.description: CSRF token or session cookie not being forwarded in test environment, causing 403 on authenticated endpoint

expected.proposed_patch:
// In fund-transfer.spec.ts, add:
await page.context().addCookies([{ name: 'X-CSRF-Token', value: csrfToken, url: baseURL }]);

failed_tests.name: contact-search > should find contacts by email
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected [] to have length 3

failed_tests.name: contact-search > should filter by company
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected [] to have length 5

failed_tests.name: contact-create > should create a new contact
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: locator.click: element is not visible

hypotheses.description: Search index was not re-populated after test data migration in CI; seed data for contacts is missing
Create contact button may have a rendering issue causing it to be hidden, possibly a CSS z-index conflict introduced in PR 334

failed_tests.name: document-upload > should upload PDF successfully
failed_tests.error: Error: File size exceeds limit: 10MB max, got 12.3MB in test fixture

hypotheses.description: Test fixture PDF file exceeds the service's file size limit; the fixture needs to be replaced with a smaller file or the test should use a mock

expected.proposed_patch:
// Replace fixture with a smaller file or mock the upload endpoint:
await page.route('**/api/documents/upload', route => route.fulfill({ status: 200, body: JSON.stringify({ id: 'doc-123', status: 'uploaded' }) }));

failed_tests.name: kanban-board > should drag task to done column
failed_tests.error: Error: Drag-and-drop interaction failed: dragstart event not fired

failed_tests.name: kanban-board > should reorder tasks within column
failed_tests.error: Error: Drag-and-drop interaction failed: dragstart event not fired

hypotheses.description: The drag-and-drop library was upgraded and the dragstart event now requires a pointer event sequence rather than mouse events; Playwright's dragTo may need updated selector strategy
PR 118 may have introduced a CSS change that covers the drag handle, preventing pointer events

failed_tests.name: report-schedule > should schedule weekly report
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected 'pending' to equal 'scheduled'

hypotheses.description: Schedule job worker is not running in CI, so status stays 'pending'; test should mock the job queue or use a stub worker

failed_tests.name: threshold-config > should save new alert threshold
failed_tests.error: Error: Network request failed: POST /api/thresholds returned 500

failed_tests.name: alert-acknowledge > should acknowledge critical alert
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: Waiting for selector '.alert-row.acknowledged' exceeded 10000ms

hypotheses.description: The thresholds API is returning 500 due to a missing database migration for the new alert_threshold_v2 schema introduced in PR 89
Acknowledgement status update is not reflected in UI without a page refresh; the UI may be missing a real-time subscription update

failed_tests.name: chat-support > should connect to live agent
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: WebSocket connection timed out after 5000ms

hypotheses.description: The live-agent WebSocket service is not available in CI environment; test requires network egress to an external chat platform

expected.proposed_patch:
// Mock the WebSocket connection in CI:
await page.route('wss://chat.globex.com/**', route => { /* mock ws handshake */ });

failed_tests.name: log-export > should export logs as CSV
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected file download to be triggered within 3000ms

failed_tests.name: log-filter > should filter by user
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected 2 rows, got 0

hypotheses.description: Browser download interception may not be configured in Playwright; need to set acceptDownloads: true in the browser context
User filter relies on audit log seed data; seed script is not populating user-specific entries for test users

expected.proposed_patch:
// In playwright.config.ts, add to use block:
acceptDownloads: true,

failed_tests.name: incident-close > should close incident and generate report
failed_tests.error: Error: PDF generation service unavailable: connection refused localhost:9090

hypotheses.description: The PDF generation sidecar service is not started in the CI Docker Compose setup; test environment is missing the service dependency

failed_tests.name: article-publish > should publish to staging
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected status 'published', got 'pending_review'

hypotheses.description: PR 712 introduced a mandatory review workflow flag that changes publish behavior; test user does not have the 'bypass_review' permission in the test environment

failed_tests.name: prompt-run > should return response within 10s
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: response not received within 10000ms

failed_tests.name: model-select > should switch model and rerun
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected model 'gpt-4' to be selected, got 'claude-3'

hypotheses.description: LLM API is rate-limited or slow in CI; response timeout of 10s is too aggressive for real inference calls and should be increased or mocked
Default model selection was changed from 'gpt-4' to 'claude-3' in PR 55 without updating the test assertion

failed_tests.name: job-rerun > should rerun failed job
failed_tests.error: Error: Unauthorized: 403 Forbidden on POST /api/jobs/rerun

hypotheses.description: The rerun endpoint now requires the 'ci:write' scope which the test service account does not have; RBAC was tightened in PR 278

failed_tests.name: certificate-download > should download course certificate as PDF
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected download filename 'certificate.pdf', got 'certificate.html'

hypotheses.description: PR 399 changed the certificate generator to return HTML instead of PDF in non-production environments; the CI environment flag is not set to production mode

failed_tests.name: payment-process > should process Visa card payment
failed_tests.error: Error: Stripe test key not configured: STRIPE_TEST_KEY env var is missing

failed_tests.name: payment-process > should process Mastercard payment
failed_tests.error: Error: Stripe test key not configured: STRIPE_TEST_KEY env var is missing

hypotheses.description: STRIPE_TEST_KEY environment variable is not set in the CI secret store; this was working locally because developers have it in .env

failed_tests.name: data-preview > should show first 100 rows
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected 100 rows, got 50

hypotheses.description: PR 621 changed the default page size from 100 to 50 rows for performance reasons; the test assertion was not updated to match the new default

expected.proposed_patch:
// In data-preview.spec.ts, update assertion:
await expect(page.locator('table tbody tr')).toHaveCount(50);

failed_tests.name: csv-export > should export trade history as CSV
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected file to have 15 rows, got 14

failed_tests.name: pnl-chart > should render profit and loss chart
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: SVG element not rendered within 5000ms

hypotheses.description: CSV export is off by one row due to header row counting discrepancy; the test counts including header but the assertion expects data rows only
PnL chart uses a lazy-loaded charting library that renders asynchronously; the 5s timeout may not account for library initialization in CI

failed_tests.name: bulk-import > should import 500 users from CSV
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: Operation timed out after 30000ms (uploaded 500 rows)

hypotheses.description: Bulk import of 500 users is a slow operation that legitimately exceeds the default 30s test timeout in CI; increase timeout or reduce fixture size for the test

expected.proposed_patch:
// In bulk-import.spec.ts, increase test timeout:
test('should import 500 users from CSV', { timeout: 90000 }, async ({ page }) => {

failed_tests.name: photo-capture > should upload defect photo
failed_tests.error: Error: Camera API not available in headless browser

hypotheses.description: The photo capture test uses the real Camera API which is unavailable in headless Playwright; needs to be mocked using page.route or input file upload simulation

failed_tests.name: appointment-book > should book appointment with Dr. Smith
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: No available slots found for provider 'Dr. Smith'

failed_tests.name: reminder-setup > should save reminder preferences
failed_tests.error: Error: HIPAA audit log write failed: database constraint violation

hypotheses.description: Test provider 'Dr. Smith' has no available slots in the CI test calendar; the appointment seed data has expired dates
HIPAA audit log table has a NOT NULL constraint on a new column added in PR 456 migration but the ORM model was not updated

failed_tests.name: approval-flow > should send approval email notification
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: Mailhog inbox did not receive email within 15000ms

hypotheses.description: Mailhog is not running in CI or SMTP_HOST is misconfigured to point at production SMTP; email service is not reachable in the CI environment

failed_tests.name: reward-redeem > should redeem 500 points for coffee voucher
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected points balance to decrease by 500, decreased by 0

hypotheses.description: Point deduction is asynchronous and processed by a background job not running in CI; the test checks balance immediately after redemption before the worker runs

failed_tests.name: billing-compare > should compare Q1 vs Q2 consumption
failed_tests.error: Error: Chart rendering error: Cannot read property 'data' of undefined

hypotheses.description: Chart component receives undefined data when the API returns an empty array for a billing period with no data; PR 143 may have removed a null guard

failed_tests.name: product-upload > should reject non-image file
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected validation error toast to appear, got success toast

hypotheses.description: PR 388 accidentally removed the MIME type validation from the upload handler, allowing non-image files to be accepted; this is a regression in server-side validation

failed_tests.name: chart-publish > should publish chart to team workspace
failed_tests.error: Error: 404 Not Found: PUT /api/charts/pub-789/publish

hypotheses.description: The publish endpoint URL changed in PR 261 from PUT /api/charts/:id/publish to POST /api/charts/:id/publish but the frontend client was not updated

failed_tests.name: lease-terminate > should prevent termination within lock-in period
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected termination to be blocked, but lease was terminated

hypotheses.description: Business rule enforcement for lock-in period was accidentally disabled by a feature flag change in PR 177; the ENFORCE_LOCK_IN_PERIOD flag defaults to false in CI

failed_tests.name: map-view > should display shipment on map
failed_tests.error: Error: Google Maps API key is invalid or missing

hypotheses.description: GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY is not configured in CI secrets; map component falls back to error state and the test cannot proceed

failed_tests.name: cart > should persist cart after page refresh
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected 2 cart items after refresh, got 0

failed_tests.name: cart > should update quantity
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected quantity 3, got 1

failed_tests.name: cart > should remove item from cart
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: cart item still visible after remove click

hypotheses.description: PR 534 migrated cart state from localStorage to a server-side session but the session cookie domain is misconfigured in the test environment, causing cart to not persist across navigation
Multiple cart test failures share the same root cause; investigating cart persistence is the primary fix needed

failed_tests.name: access-grant > should grant temporary access for 30 minutes
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected access expiry in 30 minutes, got null

hypotheses.description: Temporary access expiry field is not being set in the response; PR 99 may have introduced a null return when the expiry calculation encounters a timezone offset issue in CI

failed_tests.name: statements > should download statement as PDF
failed_tests.error: Error: Expected MIME type application/pdf, got text/html

hypotheses.description: Statement PDF generation is returning an HTML error page in CI because the PDF renderer license key is not set; the service silently degrades to HTML

failed_tests.name: checkout > should process payment
failed_tests.error: UnknownError: x

hypotheses.description: Insufficient error information to determine root cause; the 'UnknownError: x' message indicates an unhandled exception with no stack trace captured

failed_tests.error: some error

expected.error_detail: tenant_id, workspace_id, app_id, and ci_run_id are required

failed_tests.name: checkout > another flaky test
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: navigation timeout (intermittent)

failed_tests.name: checkout > third flaky test
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: locator not found (intermittent)

failed_tests.name: cart > cart flaky test
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: element detached from DOM (intermittent)

failed_tests.name: product-catalog > slow render
failed_tests.error: TimeoutError: expected element to be visible within 5000ms (intermittent)

hypotheses.description: Multiple intermittent timeout failures across unrelated components suggest a systemic CI environment performance degradation rather than code defects; consider increasing global timeout or investigating CI runner resource constraints

failed_tests.name: checkout > should process payment
failed_tests.error: AssertionError: expected 'success', got 'success'

hypotheses.description: The test is asserting the correct value but still failing; this may indicate a Playwright version bug where string comparison fails due to invisible Unicode characters or whitespace in the actual value

expected.proposed_patch:
// Try trimming the actual value in the assertion:
await expect(page.locator('.status').textContent()).resolves.toMatch(/^success$/);
